TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kuli ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 33 buwan, 130 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 124 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 86%, Amis 3%, Paywan 2%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kuli hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kuli hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kuli hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kuli hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kuli hya' ga rgyax Uruw. tay 'llaw na Kuli hya' ga Tkasan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kuli ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kuli ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kuli ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kuli ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kuli ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kuli ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax uruw. taj ʔllaw na kuli ħjaʔ ɣa tkas~ɕan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kuli ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 33 buwan, 130 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 124 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 86%, Amis 3%, Paywan 2%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kuli hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kuli hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kuli hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kuli hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kuli hya' ga rgyax Uruw. tay 'llaw na Kuli hya' ga Tkasan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kuli ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kuli ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kuli ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kuli ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kuli ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kuli ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax uruw. taj ʔllaw na kuli ħjaʔ ɣa tkas~ɕan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
